name: omni-impact-review
description: Pull the impact + risk + advisory bundle for a symbol before editing it. The recommended pre-edit ritual.

inputs.name: symbol
inputs.description: The symbol you're about to modify (function/class/method name).

inputs.name: file
inputs.description: Optional file path for context-aware advisory.

steps.explain: Get callers, callees, risk badge, suggested tests.
Surface any current errors in the target file. Skip if no file given.
Recall any historical lessons about this symbol or pattern.
